ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet-inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "shooting_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand for shooting */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the player (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Summary of the player's injury history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the current commissioner */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the league's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the season starts */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the season ends */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Date the regular season starts */,
  "playoffs_start" TEXT /* Date the playoffs start */,
  "all_star_game_date" TEXT /* Date the All-Star Game is held */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the regular season ends */,
  "finals_start" TEXT /* Date the NBA Finals start */,
  "finals_end" TEXT /* Date the NBA Finals end */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player during the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "three_pointer_percentage" REAL /* Three-pointer percentage */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Player's plus-minus rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* Player's true shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Player's effective field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_rate" REAL /* Player's free throw rate */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Player's offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Player's defensive rating */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player's player efficiency rating (PER) */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Date the contract starts */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* Date the contract ends */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., veteran, rookie, free agent) */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "option_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract has an option year */,
  "option_exercise_date" TEXT /* Date the option can be exercised */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, void) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's contract with the team */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Trade status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, knee injury) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  "rehab_program" TEXT /* Details of the player's rehabilitation program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "award_level" TEXT /* Level of the award (e.g., All-Star, All-NBA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game in the schedule */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (Home or Away) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (W or L) */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game (e.g., weather conditions, special events) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_view_data" INTEGER /* Permission to view data */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Permission to edit data */,
  "can_delete_data" INTEGER /* Permission to delete data */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Permission to manage users */,
  "can_export_data" INTEGER /* Permission to export data */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to generate reports */,
  "can_manage_teams" INTEGER /* Permission to manage team-related data */,
  "can_manage_leagues" INTEGER /* Permission to manage league-related data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., player, team, schedule) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the division */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
